title: Neomammillaria zephyranthoides
taxonomy: Neomammillaria zephyranthoides is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. The genus Neomammillaria has been reclassified to Mammillaria. As a result, Neomammillaria zephyranthoides is now classified as Mammillaria zephyranthoides. This species is native to Mexico. It belongs to the order Caryophyllales due to its cactus family classification.
